L1.area: Image processing and color histogram generation

L2.description: A command injection vulnerability exists where user-controlled input parameters are interpolated directly into a shell command string without sanitization, allowing execution of arbitrary commands via shell metacharacters.

L3.area: Color histogram generation and image conversion command execution
L3.description: A command injection vulnerability exists where user-controlled input parameters such as file paths and numeric options are interpolated directly into a shell command string that invokes an external image conversion tool, allowing execution of arbitrary commands via shell metacharacters.

ground_truth.reason: The initialize method in the Histogram class interpolates user-controlled image_path, colors, and depth parameters directly into a backtick shell command without sanitization, allowing arbitrary command execution via shell metacharacters.
